title: India Appears Sidelined as Pakistan Tries to Play Peacemaker in Iran
summary_full: Hours before a call between President Trump and India’s prime minister, American officials urged India to focus on shared goals and ignore differences.
summary_public: Hours before a call between President Trump and India’s prime minister, American officials urged India to focus on shared goals and ignore differences.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: Pakistan Tries to Play Peacemaker in Iran
